name: Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC) API
what_it_does: Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC) REST API for construction project management platform via Autodesk Platform Services (APS). Enables AI agents to manage construction project creation and configuration, handle issue tracking and RFI (Request for Information) management, access submittal and approval workflow automation, retrieve BIM model and sheet management data, manage punch list and quality control workflows, handle meeting minutes and action item tracking, access daily log and field report management, retrieve schedule and milestone tracking data, manage budget and cost management workflows, and integrate construction project data with ERP, BIM, and field management systems.
use_cases: Automating RFI and issue tracking from construction project management agents
Managing submittal approval workflows from construction documentation agents
Accessing BIM and sheet data from design coordination agents
Integrating construction data with ERP from project finance agents
not_for: Civil and infrastructure projects without building construction focus
Residential homebuilder without commercial construction management requirements
Simple project management without BIM and construction-specific workflows
best_when: A general contractor, subcontractor, or owner using Autodesk Construction Cloud wants AI agents to automate RFI management, submittal tracking, issue resolution, quality control, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Automated RFI and submittal responses in construction have contractual and schedule implications — automated approval or rejection requires human review for liability. BIM model data automation must maintain design coordination integrity.

auth.notes: Autodesk Construction Cloud uses OAuth 2.0 via Autodesk Platform Services (APS, formerly Forge). Client credentials and 3-legged OAuth for user context. APS developer documentation and portal. Webhooks for project and model events. SDKs for Python, Node.js, .NET, Java. ACC Data Connector for bulk data export. Strong BIM 360 compatibility.

pricing.free_tier_limits: APS free tier: 50 cloud credits/month; ACC projects require paid subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: ACC subscription per user per year; Build ($535/user/yr), Docs, Cost modules separately priced
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Autodesk Inc. NASDAQ: ADSK. Construction Cloud launched 2019 (merger of PlanGrid, BuildingConnected, BIM 360). $5.5B+ annual revenue. Used by Turner Construction and Balfour Beatty. BIM 360 legacy platform migrating to ACC. Competes with Procore for construction management software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; APS cloud credits consumed per API call

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: RFI/submittal approval automation has contractual implications — human review required before automated approval actions
APS cloud credits consumption — some API calls consume cloud credits; monitor credit usage to avoid budget overruns
3-legged OAuth for user context — ACC project access may require user authorization; service account 2-legged has different scope
BIM 360 vs ACC migration — some customers still on BIM 360; verify target platform before integration
ACC Data Connector for bulk data — large-scale data export uses ACC Data Connector separately from REST API
No public MCP server — OAuth2 APS REST API with well-maintained developer portal
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction project management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Construction project data and BIM models.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction management and BIM. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Construction project and design data.
